summary: Full E2E validation of iteration 7 fixes. BACKEND: 18/18 pytest pass (test_lindart_api.py + test_lindart_ai.py). /api/download/source returns Content-Type=application/zip, 352KB (>50KB threshold). FRONTEND: /studio now renders with ZERO R3F runtime errors and ZERO console/page errors (previous iter_7 CRITICAL R3F 'x-line-number' + 'Cannot convert undefined or null to object' bugs are FIXED — data-testid is on wrapper div, no <Environment> drei). Productions3D canvas renders and shape switching (geodo/bandeja/colar) works without crash. Productions3D handleGenerate: loading toast '🍌 Nano Banana renderizando peça…' appears, button stays disabled ~10s (real Nano Banana latency), then re-enables when fetch completes — try/catch surfaces feedback via toast.success/error id replacement (iter_7 HIGH 'silent failure / button re-enables in ~1s' is FIXED). OpeningTour: auto-opens after localStorage clear, 4 steps with prev/next/progress/skip/mute, 'Começar' closes modal — all PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: Productions3D.jsx is well-structured: data-testid='prod3d-canvas' now on wrapper div (not <Canvas>), no <Environment preset='studio'>, try/catch with toast.loading/success/error using same tid for clean replacement. R3F crash root-cause fully addressed.
MixerSwirl uses async job (job_id polling on /api/ai/video-status/<id>) with 90 attempt cap and graceful timeout toast — robust pattern.
OpeningTour caches narration audio per step (cacheRef Map of objectURLs) and revokes on unmount — no memory leak.
Minor: Productions3D handleGenerate could log network status for easier debugging (currently only surfaces error.message).
seed_data_creation: None. Cleared localStorage('lindart.tour.v1.seen') in browser to validate tour auto-open.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 CRITICAL R3F errors and HIGH silent-generate are fully resolved. /studio renders cleanly. Backend suite (test_lindart_api.py + test_lindart_ai.py) is the regression baseline — keep it green. For Sora 2 video, generate-video returns job_id immediately and MixerSwirl polls /api/ai/video-status/{id} every 5s up to ~7.5min. Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from frontend/.env.
rca_of_the_issue: Previous iter_7 R3F 'x-line-number' bug was caused by data-testid being passed to <Canvas> (which forwards extra props that R3F reconciler tried to apply onto Three.js instances) compounded with <Environment preset='studio'> from drei attempting to load an external HDRI that could fail without a proper Suspense fallback. Both have been removed/relocated in current code (data-testid now on wrapper div line 227, no Environment). Result: /studio mounts/unmounts cleanly with zero R3F errors. The 'silent generate' bug was the cascade effect — once R3F was stable, the try/catch + toast.loading/success/error path now executes as designed.
